---
title: "People"
subtitle: "Meet our research team and collaborators"
page-layout: full
date-format: "YYYY-MM"
listing:
  - id: lab-member
    sort: false
    type: grid
    fields: [image, title, subtitle]
    grid-item-align: center
    grid-columns: 3
    image-height: 250px
    contents: 
      - people/silvia-stringhini.yml
      - people/rebecca-lawn.yml
      - people/amanda-kurowski.yml
      - people/kalia-bennett.yml
      - people/shelby-vereecke.yml
      - people/qinlan-yang.yml
      - people/keenan-elliott.yml
  - id: lab-alumni
    sort: false
    type: table
    fields: [title, subtitle, started, ended]
    field-types:
      started: date
      ended: date
    field-display-names: 
      title: "Name"
      subtitle: "Previous Role / Current Affiliation"
      started: "Started"
      ended: "Ended"
#    contents: 
#      - people/silvia-stringhini.yml

page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
toc: false

format:  
  html:
    link-external-newwindow: true
---

## Current Team

:::{#lab-member}
:::

## Alumni

:::{#lab-alumni}
:::
